schema.name: BitSightObservationStatistics_CL
schema.description: The BitSightObservationStatistics table contains observations statistics per risk vector for each portfolio company from the BitSight API ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: RiskVector
columns.description: Risk vector slug (dict key — always null due to CCF JSONPath limitation).

columns.name: ObservationCount
columns.description: Total number of observations for this risk vector in the measurement period.

columns.name: AverageDurationDays
columns.description: Average duration in days for observations.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
